name: Scallop and Smoked Salmon Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces smoked salmon, cut into strips
8 ounces spinach fettuccine or other pasta, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
3. Stir together milk and cornstarch; add to garlic. Cook and stir over medium-low heat until thickened and bubbly.
4. Add mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese, pepper, and saffron; stir until cheeses are melted and smooth.
5. Add scallops, green onion, and capers; cook for 3 to 5 minutes, stirring often, until scallops are done.
6. Stir in smoked salmon.
7. Serve over hot fettuccine or pasta.
